scene_description:
**Left foreground:** A large tree with green leaves and multiple branches extending over a calm water body. The water body is visible from the left edge to the mid-left of the image.  

**Center foreground:** A narrow, paved gray road with visible tree shadows. The road has dirt shoulders on both sides.  

**Right foreground:** Dense green vegetation (bushes and trees with broad leaves) lines the right side of the road. At the far right edge, a cluster of brown, conical objects (resembling brush or plant material) is partially visible.  

**Left midground:** The calm water body continues, bordered by dense green vegetation (bushes and small trees) along its edge.  

**Center midground:** The road extends into the distance. On the right side of the road, tall palm trees with large fronds and dense green foliage are prominent. Additional dense trees and bushes line both sides of the road.  

**Center background:** A small structure with a green roof and blue/green facade is positioned at the end of the road. A small, dark-colored vehicle (partially visible) is near this structure.  

**Upper background:** Multiple parallel utility wires (at least four) stretch across the sky from left to right. The supporting utility poles are not visible in the frame.  

**No visible text, signs, road markings, license plates, or street lamps are present.** The road surface shows no lane markings or crosswalks. The terrain is flat.
